/usr/bin/c++ -rdynamic -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/pifridge.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/pifridge.dir/main.o -o pifridge   -L/home/pifridge/PiFridge/src/BME680/BME680  -L/home/pifridge/PiFridge/src/BME680/common  -L/home/pifridge/PiFridge/src/BME680/web_app  BME680/libbme680.a common/liblinux_i2c.a -lpifridge_rpi_hw web_app/libpifridge_web.a -lThreads::Threads -lfcgi -lThreads::Threads
